title: Egyptian Chicken Kebabs
description: A spicy and flavorful dish inspired by Egyptian cuisine, featuring marinated chicken kebabs grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, spices, and kebab sauce.
Add the chicken cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated chicken, onion, bell pepper, and tomato onto skewers.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve hot with additional kebab sauce, if desired.
